name: Qualys CyberSecurity Asset Management
description: Comprehensive asset management and external attack surface monitoring providing asset inventory, software discovery, CVE correlation, and unauthorized asset detection

actions.name: List Assets
actions.description: Search and retrieve host assets in the global IT asset inventory

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: QQL (Qualys Query Language) filter expression for asset search

parameters.name: lastModifiedDate
parameters.description: Filter assets modified after a specific date (ISO format)

actions.name: Count Assets
actions.description: Get the total number of host assets matching filter criteria

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: QQL filter expression for counting assets

actions.name: Get Asset Details
actions.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific asset including software inventory and configuration

parameters.name: asset_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the asset

actions.name: Get CVE Details
actions.description: Retrieve vulnerability data (CVEs) for software and operating systems in the asset catalog

parameters.name: cveId
parameters.description: CVE identifier to look up (e.g., CVE-2021-44228)

parameters.name: softwareId
parameters.description: Software ID to get associated CVEs

actions.name: List External Assets
actions.description: Retrieve internet-facing assets discovered through external scanning

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: QQL filter for external assets (e.g., asset.isExternalFacing:true)

actions.name: List Unauthorized Software
actions.description: Search for unauthorized or unapproved software across managed assets

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: QQL filter for unauthorized software detection

actions.name: Search Domains
actions.description: Search for domain assets and their associated metadata

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: QQL filter expression targeting domain assets
